title: Infrastructure Service
description: Schema for services in the Urbalurba Infrastructure Stack

id.description: Unique identifier for the service (lowercase, hyphenated)

description.description: Brief description of the service (1-2 sentences)

category.description: Reference to category ID in categories.json

logo.description: Logo filename (SVG preferred, WebP fallback). Empty string if no logo available.

docs.description: Path to documentation within the site

checkCommand.description: Shell command to verify service is running

removePlaybook.description: Ansible playbook filename for removal, optionally followed by parameters

requires.description: IDs of services this service depends on (hard dependencies)

configurable.description: Whether this service supports uis configure (per-app database/user creation). Only data services and identity services are configurable.

exposePort.description: Fixed well-known port for uis expose. Avoids conflicts with standard ports (e.g., PostgreSQL 35432 instead of 5432).

kind.description: Whether this is a software component or infrastructure resource

type.description: What kind of component or resource

providesApis.description: API names this service provides (shown in Backstage 'Provided APIs' tab)

consumesApis.description: API names this service consumes (shown in Backstage 'Consumed APIs' tab)
